meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Project Stalling
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on client projects. Learn how to implement automated user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to ensure rapid delivery and high retention.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is often 'feature creep' triggered by poor user clarity. By implementing a systematic, automated onboarding flow, you align client expectations, reduce support overhead, and force a 'Definition of Done' early. Use Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code to automate the integration of onboarding logic.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the initial spark of a project burns out, replaced by the crushing weight of scope creep and client confusion. You're trapped in a cycle of endless iterations, unable to push the 'ship' button because the users don't understand the value proposition. The project isn't failing because of your code; it's failing because the user journey is a maze.

True professional velocity isn't about writing code faster—it's about building systems that guide the user to the 'Aha!' moment instantly. By integrating a high-fidelity onboarding layer, you effectively solve the project stagnation problem, turning vague client requirements into structured, repeatable user paths that guarantee project completion.

steps.title: Define the Value-Path Blueprint
steps.description: Before writing code, map the shortest path from sign-up to the core project value. This prevents feature bloat.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a concise user flow diagram for a SaaS onboarding sequence that prioritizes the 'first value' metric. Keep it under 5 steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a markdown document defining the core user value path and the 5 essential onboarding steps'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding Component
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a modular onboarding UI component that can be injected into any project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a modular, accessible React onboarding component using Tailwind CSS. Include props for dynamic step rendering.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'generate onboarding component files based on the blueprint'

steps.title: Implement State-Driven Progress
steps.description: Ensure the application tracks the user's progress through the onboarding flow to prevent abandonment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a custom hook 'useOnboardingState' that persists progress to local storage and syncs with the backend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement state persistence for the onboarding flow'

steps.title: Automate Success Triggers
steps.description: Connect onboarding completion to backend triggers that unlock the main application dashboard.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a middleware function that checks for the 'onboarding_complete' flag and redirects users accordingly.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply authentication middleware for onboarding gatekeeping'

steps.title: Refine with User Analytics
steps.description: Inject telemetry into the onboarding flow to identify where users drop off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add instrumentation to the onboarding component to track completion rates per step using a generic event logger.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'integrate event tracking into all onboarding steps'

pro_tips: Never let a client define onboarding; define it yourself based on data to save 20+ hours of scope creep.
Use 'ghost states' in your UI to show users what the app looks like before they provide data.
Treat onboarding as a product feature, not a UX task; it should have its own dedicated repository folder.
Always include a 'Skip' button. Forcing users through complex onboarding is the fastest way to kill conversion.
Use Claude Code to write automated E2E tests specifically for your onboarding flow to prevent regressions during client changes.
resources: UX Collective Onboarding Best Practices: https://uxdesign.cc
content.next_steps: Audit your existing stalled projects. Apply the 5-step onboarding framework to the most critical one this week to clear the backlog.
content.conversion_block: Stop chasing feature requests and start shipping completed, high-value products that clients love. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
